raw_text:
--- Lamina A ---
1. v.supni astnei
2. v.supni larθi puinei X
3. v.supni velanial
4. v.supni ceicnal
5. l.velusna felmviai
6. v.velusna v calati
7. v.puina armnial
8. l.larθi fulnei
9. pultace ceicna icapuni
10. l.larθi θepza
11. cure malave pultace
12. l??? ist? v? v? θa
13. vlcae fulθuna
14. l.ultace (?)
--- Lamina B ---
1. acep fulθuna mazutini
2. l.larθi θa armne
3. alθruz fulθuna
4. l.larθi
5. a.velani puine
6. a.velusna
7. fasta l.larθi
8. laθi plavi urmte
9. l.armne
10. masve ceicnei
11. qaves etra qvi
12. θusce θimv larθi paqe
